name: I'm in New York—does location matter for answer engine optimization cases?
description: NY laws favor consumers; check contract forum.[1]

mainEntity.name: I'm in New York—does location matter for answer engine optimization cases?

acceptedAnswer.text: NY laws favor consumers; check contract forum.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, New York courts apply strict consumer protection laws to AEO disputes, potentially increasing recovery.** Jurisdiction governs contracts.[1]

Local rules affect filing, statutes (e.g., 6 years breach).[1] NYSBA notes AI liability angles.[1]

**Key factors:**
- Forum selection clauses.
- NY Gen Bus Law §349 for deception.
- Evidence standards same.
- Higher damages possible.

File in NY Supreme Court if over $50K. Consult local bar for AI-savvy counsel.
